chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-141 of 2026. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case. 09.03.2026. Mr. Muhammad Hassan Chandio, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. Mr. Irfan Ali Talpur, Deputy Prosecutor General for the State alongwith SIP Abdul Latif Thaheem (SHO PS Sakrand). ***************************************** Mr. Aijaz Ali Bhutto, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent No.5 to 7, which is taken on record. SHO PS Sakrand present in Court files parawise comments alongwith copy of free will affidavit dated 12.11.2025 and Nikahnama which reflects that the alleged abductee Mst. Ayesha d/o Ghulam Sarwar has contracted marriage on account of her free will and wish on 12.11.2025 and she does not want to contact with her parents neither she has been abducted by anyone nor a missing lady but her parents being annoyed intend to drag her out in Court by filing instant Petition, therefore, such controversy came within the ambit of factual controversy and cannot be resolved under writ jurisdiction. Accordingly, the instant Petition stands disposed of alongwith pending application(s), if any. JUDGE Ali.
